prompt:
A compact mission-planning card and small notebook page laid out on a workbench, showing a simplified sky-arc diagram and a highlighted viewing window for an upcoming space-station flyover. The card includes a minimal compass-rose graphic, a clean elevation curve, and a few unlabeled tick marks, with a handheld star-spotting monocular and a simple tripod nearby to imply stargazing prep without relying on readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic (2040s): soft cinematic lighting, clean materials, realistic paper texture and matte plastics, no brand logos, no readable text or UI labels. Keep the composition uncluttered and icon-friendly, with the planning card as the clear focal subject.
